# BDE Score™

> AI-Powered Multi-Market Stock Analysis — One Score, Every Market

BDE Score™ provides comprehensive stock analysis across US, Hong Kong, and China A-share markets with a unified BDE scoring methodology (0-100 scale). It covers fundamental, technical, and ESG dimensions.

## Key Features

- Multi-market coverage: US (NYSE/NASDAQ), HK (HKEX), CN (SSE/SZSE)
- BDE Score: Composite 0-100 scoring (fundamental + technical + risk)
- ESG analysis: Environmental, Social, Governance metrics
- Cross-market comparison: Same company across different exchanges
- Stock screener: Filter by BDE criteria
- EU AI Act Article 50 compliant

## API

- [REST API documentation](https://hbhqq9.github.io/bde-score/)
- [API Health Check](https://hbhqq9.github.io/bde-score/api/health)
- [BDE Score Endpoint](https://hbhqq9.github.io/bde-score/api/score/{symbol})

## MCP Server

- [MCP installation guide](https://github.com/hbhqq9/bde-score/blob/master/llms-install.md)
- [MCP README](https://github.com/hbhqq9/bde-score/blob/master/mcp/README.md)

### Available MCP Tools

- `get_bde_score`: Comprehensive BDE scoring for any stock
- `get_multi_market_comparison`: Cross-market comparison
- `get_stock_screener`: Screen by criteria
- `get_esg_analysis`: ESG analysis
- `get_sector_analysis`: Sector overview

## Quick Start

```python
import requests
r = requests.get("https://your-api-url/api/score/AAPL")
data = r.json()  # BDE Score + breakdown
```

## Installation

```bash
git clone https://github.com/hbhqq9/bde-score.git
cd bde-score
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/hbhqq9/bde-score)
- [Live Dashboard](https://hbhqq9.github.io/bde-score/dashboard)
- [MCP Registry](https://registry.modelcontextprotocol.io) (io.github.hbhqq9/bde-score)
